security.csp: default-src 'self' tauri: ipc: http://ipc.localhost; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: blob: tauri: asset: http://asset.localhost; media-src 'self' data: blob: tauri: asset: http://asset.localhost; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost ws://localhost:5173; font-src 'self' data:; worker-src 'self' blob:

bundle.longDescription: Tauri-based tray + control panel for the horchd wakeword detection daemon. Talks to the daemon over D-Bus on the session bus.
